title: Liftmaster Odrin Slatehand
atAGlance: Odrin Slatehand controls emergency lift rotations in Kharad-Vul and can move an army or a refugee line with one chain order.
sageNotes: Odrin smells of machine oil and hot iron filings, and he trusts neither nobles nor panic. He knows every lift tower by sound, claims he can hear a failing brake through festival drums, and keeps redundant keys sewn into his coat lining. People call him stubborn; survivors call him punctual. If Odrin says a platform cannot hold another wagon, arguing with him is just a slower way to fall.
gameInformation: Use as a logistics gatekeeper for vertical movement and timed extractions. He can grant priority ascents, hidden service shafts, or shutdown authority over compromised towers. Complication: forged Odrin orders are circulating, creating lethal bottlenecks and faction blame spirals.
